info.name: Mohammed Eltawous - Subscription, Payment, Workshop APIs
info.description: Postman collection for Stripe credit purchase, subscription status, workshop generation, report markdown, PDF upload, and history APIs. Set accessToken after login. Frontend only sends tier for payment; backend forces AED and redirect URLs from FRONTEND_URL.

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns starter, professional, and strategic plans with AED/USD/EUR/GBP pricing. Payment start currently uses AED only.

item.name: Initialize Payment - Frontend Sends Only Plan

request.description: Protected endpoint. Frontend sends only tier. Backend uses logged-in user from Bearer token, forces AED, creates Stripe Checkout Session, and saves local Payment as pending. Copy data.paymentId into the paymentId collection variable. Open data.checkoutUrl in browser to pay.

response.name: Example response

request.description: Protected endpoint. Returns status only if the payment belongs to the logged-in user. Status changes from pending to succeeded after the cron verifies Stripe payment.
Protected endpoint. Frontend can call this after payment to check current tier and available credits.
Protected endpoint. Returns purchase, usage, bonus, and refund credit transactions for the logged-in user.

response.name: Example response

item.name: Classify Forces - Costs 1 Credit After Success

body.raw:
{
  "company": {
    "name": "Nova Retail",
    "industry": "E-commerce",
    "region": "UAE",
    "focalQuestion": "How can Nova Retail grow profitably by 2030?",
    "horizonYear": "2030",
    "description": "Nova Retail is an online fashion and lifestyle marketplace serving GCC customers."
  },
  "forces": [
    "AI-driven personalization becomes standard in online retail",
    "Customer acquisition costs continue to rise",
    "Cross-border logistics become faster and cheaper",
    "New data privacy regulations limit personalized advertising",
    "Sustainability expectations increase among younger consumers",
    "Large global marketplaces enter the GCC more aggressively"
  ],
  "conversationHistory": []
}

request.description: Protected endpoint. Creates a WorkshopAnalysis linked to logged-in user, checks available credits, calls Claude, deducts 1 credit only after successful generation, saves classification, and returns sessionId. Copy sessionId into the sessionId collection variable.

response.name: Example response

request.description: Protected endpoint. Finds WorkshopAnalysis by sessionId and logged-in user, generates axes, saves axes, and updates lastActivityAt.

response.name: Example response

request.description: Protected endpoint. Finds the user's workshop by sessionId, generates four scenarios, saves scenarios, and updates lastActivityAt.

response.name: Example response

request.description: Protected endpoint. Finds the user's workshop by sessionId, generates wind tunnel results, saves windTunnelResults, and updates lastActivityAt. If strategicOptions is empty, AI generates options.

response.name: Example response

request.description: Protected endpoint. Streams markdown text/plain. After stream completes, backend saves the full markdown to WorkshopAnalysis.report and sets completedAt. In Postman, the response appears as plain streamed text plus a final ###JSON_DATA### marker.

response.name: Example streamed response
response.body:
## Executive Summary
Nova Retail should focus on loyalty, AI personalization, and differentiated category depth.

## Recommendations
- Build owned customer relationships
- Reduce dependence on paid acquisition

###JSON_DATA###{"success":true,"reportMarkdown":"## Executive Summary\n...","generatedAt":"2026-06-02T10:00:00.000Z","sessionId":"{{sessionId}}"}

item.name: Generate PDF And Upload To Cloudinary

body.raw:
{
  "sessionId": "{{sessionId}}",
  "companyName": "Nova Retail",
  "reportMarkdown": "## Executive Summary
Nova Retail should focus on loyalty, AI personalization, and niche category depth.

## Focal Question
How can Nova Retail grow profitably by 2030?

## Recommendations
- Build owned customer relationships
- Reduce dependence on paid acquisition
- Create differentiated private label offerings"
}

request.description: Protected endpoint. Verifies session belongs to logged-in user, converts reportMarkdown to PDF using PDFKit, uploads it to Cloudinary, saves pdfUrl/pdfFileName/pdfGeneratedAt on WorkshopAnalysis, and returns the Cloudinary URL.
Protected endpoint. Returns the logged-in user's recent workshop sessions with saved markdown report and PDF metadata for frontend history list.

item.name: Get One Workshop By Session ID

request.description: Protected endpoint. Returns full saved workshop for this user and sessionId, including classification, axes, scenarios, windTunnelResults, report markdown, and pdfUrl.
